component.name: Waystone
component.summary: Multi-protocol browser for the small web

description.p: Waystone is a lightweight, multi-protocol browser designed for the small web. It supports HTTP/HTTPS (via WebKit), Gemini, Gopher, Spartan, and Titan protocols, giving you a single app for browsing both the modern and alternative internet.

ul.li: Gemini protocol with streaming rendering and TLS support
Spartan protocol support including data-input links
Titan protocol file and text uploads
Bookmarks with folder organisation and a pinnable Bookmarks Bar
Dark mode support via system preference

description.p: Initial release featuring HTTP/HTTPS, Gemini, Gopher, Spartan, and Titan protocol support.
